title: Message Ordering & Partitioning
description: Analyze the challenges and requirements for maintaining message order in distributed messaging systems. Utilize shard-keys in platforms like Kafka or Kinesis to ensure strict ordering of events for a specific entity's lifecycle.
objectives: Analyze the challenges and requirements for maintaining message order in distributed messaging systems.
Utilize shard-keys in platforms like Kafka or Kinesis to ensure strict ordering of events for a specific entity's lifecycle.
